'''âr-n-z-w''' ('''karanzewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monogamize|monogamize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monogamize|monogamize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| karanzewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiranzewoko|thiranzewoko]] || [[word:jiranzewoko|jiranzewoko]] || [[word:shiranzewoko|shiranzewoko]] || [[word:kiranzewoko|kiranzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuranzewoko|thuthuranzewoko]] || [[word:jujuranzewoko|jujuranzewoko]] || [[word:shushuranzewoko|shushuranzewoko]] || [[word:kukuranzewoko|kukuranzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuranzewoko|thuranzewoko]] || [[word:juranzewoko|juranzewoko]] || [[word:shuranzewoko|shuranzewoko]] || [[word:kuranzewoko|kuranzewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoranzewoko|thoranzewoko]] || [[word:joranzewoko|joranzewoko]] || [[word:shoranzewoko|shoranzewoko]] || [[word:koranzewoko|koranzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠranzewoko|thĂŠranzewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠranzewoko|jĂŠranzewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠranzewoko|shĂŠranzewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠranzewoko|kĂŠranzewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharanzewoko|tharanzewoko]] || [[word:jaranzewoko|jaranzewoko]] || [[word:sharanzewoko|sharanzewoko]] || [[word:karanzewoko|karanzewoko]]
|}
